channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Children conceived via infertility treatments show similar growth to naturally conceived children
item.description: After adjusting for plurality, children from infertility treatments had growth patterns comparable to those conceived naturally.

item.title: PMOS: Insulin Resistance Affects Fertility and Pregnancy
item.description: Prepregnancy insulin resistance is linked to reduced fertility and higher risks of pregnancy complications like preeclampsia.

item.title: Mixed Results for Home-Based Bipolar Depression Stimulation
item.description: Home-based low-field magnetic stimulation improved self-reported symptoms but not clinician-rated scores in bipolar depression patients.

item.title: Mesothelioma Survival Challenges Persist in the US
item.description: Researchers analyzed Global Burden of Disease 2023 data on mesothelioma in the US, examining incidence and deaths by sex.
